Configuration

Admin Panel

Check-in page
Google Form connection and field IDs for the learner check-in page.
Replace viewform with formResponse in the form URL
Generator page
Base URL that QR codes point to — the hosted check-in page URL.
Full URL including filename
Training curricula
These appear as checkboxes in the generator. Label is shown to the trainer, abbreviation is used in URL parameters.
Qualtrics surveys
Survey options shown in the generator. Name is displayed to the trainer, URL is the Qualtrics survey link.
Export updated files
Download updated HTML files with your configuration baked in. Upload them to GitHub to deploy the changes.
🔒
checkin.html
Learner check-in page with form action and field IDs
📋
generator.html
Trainer QR generator with curricula, surveys, and base URL
